title: BIG BROTHERS BIG SISTERS MENTORING PROGRAM - 211info
text: BIG BROTHERS BIG SISTERS OF CENTRAL OREGON BIG BROTHERS BIG SISTERS MENTORING PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides one-on-one mentoring to children through screened and trained volunteers. Mentors spend time with children reading books, playing sports, helping with homework, various outings, giving advice and inspiration. 62895 Hamby Road Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Ages 6-18 Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (541) 312-6047 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 312-6047 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Crook, Deschutes, and Jefferson Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located in East Bend on Silvis Road, near Municipal Airport Services: Mentoring Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
